title: Free EU mobility must be free of labour abuse [Promoted Content]
summary_full: The EU’s Fair Labour Mobility Package must put clear emphasis on fairness and put an end to labour abuse arising from free movement. Only by ensuring fairness for workers in the Single Market can free movement strengthen the competitiveness of companies that follow the rules
